title: Horizon Hero Section
description: A full-screen dark hero built on Three.js with a star field, procedural mountain silhouette layers, a GLSL nebula plane, and atmospheric sphere glow. GSAP ScrollTrigger drives camera travel through three scroll sections (HORIZON → COSMOS → INFINITY) with smooth easing, while a GSAP entrance timeline reveals the menu, split-character title, and subtitle lines on load.
